name: MERIDIAN
tagline: Shaping Tomorrow's Enterprises Through Strategic Innovation & Technology Excellence
description: MERIDIAN Group is a global strategy and technology consultancy that partners with industry-leading organizations to navigate complexity, accelerate growth, and build resilient enterprises.
longDescription: Founded in 2009, we have grown from a boutique advisory firm into a multi-disciplinary consultancy spanning four continents. Our integrated approach combines deep industry expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver measurable impact at scale.
clientTypes: We serve Fortune 500 enterprises, sovereign wealth funds, and high-growth organizations across technology, financial services, healthcare, energy, and infrastructure sectors.
